/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libmy_engine.pyd -o libmy_engine.pyd CMakeFiles/my_engine.dir/bindings/bindings.cpp.o CMakeFiles/my_engine.dir/src/Jade.cpp.o CMakeFiles/my_engine.dir/src/Dispatcher.cpp.o CMakeFiles/my_engine.dir/src/JadeCpuKernels.cpp.o CMakeFiles/my_engine.dir/src/JadeReactor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/my_engine.dir/src/JadeGpuKernels.cpp.o
